about.title: About Click India Capital
about.subtitle: Founder-led, expert-driven.
about.p1: Click India Capital was founded with a simple mission — to make finding the right loan easier, faster, and more transparent.
about.p2: Unlike large loan marketplaces that operate through call centers and automated systems, Click India Capital is led by a lending professional with over 25 years of experience across banks, NBFCs, captive finance companies, and retail lending institutions. Our experience spans vehicle loans, commercial vehicle finance, two-wheeler finance, personal lending, collections, portfolio management, dealer network development, and digital lending transformation.
about.p3: Having worked with leading organizations including ESAF Small Finance Bank, Mahindra & Mahindra Financial Services, Volkswagen Finance, ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, Mashreq Bank, GE Money, Ashok Leyland Finance, and Popular Automobiles, we understand how lenders evaluate applications and what borrowers need to improve their chances of approval.
about.p4: At Click India Capital, we combine industry expertise with technology to help customers compare loan options, assess eligibility, understand documentation requirements, and connect with suitable lending partners. Our goal is not just to help customers obtain loans, but to help them make informed financial decisions.
about.p5: Whether you are purchasing a vehicle, growing a business, buying a home, or seeking personal financing, Click India Capital is committed to providing honest guidance, transparent processes, and personalized support throughout your loan journey.
about.p6: We believe every financial decision deserves expert attention, and every customer deserves a trusted partner.
about.founderP1: Sameer Krishnan is a retail lending and product management professional with more than 25 years of experience in the Indian financial services industry. Throughout his career, he has worked with leading banks, NBFCs, and finance companies across sales, credit, collections, product management, dealer development, and digital transformation initiatives.
about.founderP2: After serving as Product Manager – Mobility Loans at ESAF Small Finance Bank, he has now dedicated his full time to developing Click India Capital, converting his 25+ years of industry experience into an entrepreneurial journey. His extensive background includes managing lending portfolios, developing lending products, improving operational processes, maintaining portfolio quality, and building strong partner ecosystems across India.
about.founderP3: Click India Capital is founded on this experience, with a focus on helping customers navigate the loan process confidently and responsibly.

chatbot.title: Click India Assistant
chatbot.greeting: Hi there! 👋 Welcome to Click India Capital. I'm here to help you check your loan eligibility. What type of loan are you looking for?
chatbot.q_employment: Great! Are you Salaried or Self-Employed?
chatbot.q_salary: What is your approximate net monthly income in Rupees? (e.g. 50000)
chatbot.q_name: Perfect. I have compiled your profile! Please provide your Full Name.
chatbot.q_phone: And finally, what is your 10-digit Mobile Number so our expert Sameer can contact you with your exact loan offers?
chatbot.success: Thank you! 🎉 We have received your details. Our team will contact you shortly with your personalized offers.
